title: List of Foreign Regulatory Authorities for Biocides - Canada.ca
content:

Statute or legislative instrument
Types of ineligible applications
United States of America
United States Environmental Protection Agency
Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act (FIFRA)
Emergency Exemptions (under Section 18 of FIFRA and 40 Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) 166) State-specific registration (under Section 24(c) of FIFRA and 40 CFR 162)
